import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { 
  Shield, Lock, RefreshCw, Zap, Activity, 
  CheckCircle, Terminal, AlertTriangle, Server, 
  LayoutDashboard, FileText, Settings, BarChart3, 
  ChevronRight, Sliders, Bell, User, LogOut,
  Database, HelpCircle, X, Mail, MessageSquare,
  Globe, Smartphone, Key, ShieldAlert, History,
  Cpu, Network, GitCommit
} from 'lucide-react';

// --- CORE UTILITIES ---
// (Logic preserved for standalone execution within this demo)

type Result<T, E = Error> = Ok<T> | Err<E>;
class Ok<T> { readonly _tag = "Ok"; constructor(readonly value: T) {} isSuccess(): this is Ok<T> { return true; } isFailure(): this is Err<never> { return false; } unwrap(): T { return this.value; } }
class Err<E> { readonly _tag = "Err"; constructor(readonly error: E) {} isSuccess(): this is Ok<never> { return false; } isFailure(): this is Err<E> { return true; } unwrap(): never { throw this.error; } }
const ok = <T,>(value: T): Ok<T> => new Ok(value);
const err = <E,>(error: E): Err<E> => new Err(error);

class Task<T, E = Error> {
  private constructor(private readonly _promise: () => Promise<Result<T, E>>) {}
  static from<T>(name: string, promiseFactory: () => Promise<T>): Task<T, Error> {
    return new Task(async () => { try { const data = await promiseFactory(); return ok(data); } catch (e) { return err(e instanceof Error ? e : new Error(String(e))); } });
  }
  async run(): Promise<Result<T, E>> { return this._promise(); }
}

class Telemetry {
  static async measureHybrid<C, Q>(name: string, classicalFn: () => Promise<C>, quantumFn: () => Promise<Q>) {
    const startC = performance.now(); const classical = await classicalFn(); const endC = performance.now();
    const startQ = performance.now(); const quantum = await quantumFn(); const endQ = performance.now();
    return { classical, quantum, metrics: { timestamp: Date.now(), classicalMs: endC - startC, quantumMs: endQ - startQ, delta: (endQ - startQ) - (endC - startC) } };
  }
}

class Guard {
  static isHybridKeyBundle(bundle: any, strictMode: boolean = true): boolean {
    if (!bundle) return false;
    const validC = bundle.classical && (bundle.classical instanceof CryptoKey || (bundle.classical.kty === 'EC'));
    const validQ = bundle.quantum && bundle.quantum.matrixA && bundle.quantum.vectorT;
    if (strictMode && (!validC || !validQ)) throw new Error("Guard Violation: 50/50 Standard Required.");
    return true;
  }
}

// --- MOCK CRYPTO ENGINE ---
// In a real production build, this would import from the fusion-core library.
// Here we mock the behavior to demonstrate the UI flow and latency visualization.
class FusionEngine {
  async initialize() { 
    // Simulate initialization delay
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); 
  }
  
  getPublicKeys() { 
    return { classical: { kty: 'EC' }, quantum: { matrixA: [], vectorT: [] } }; 
  } 
  
  async encapsulate(keys: any, config: any) {
    // Simulating the result for the UI demo with configurable jitter
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600 + (Math.random() * config.latencyJitter)));
    return {
      sharedSecret: {}, 
      ciphertext: {}, 
      metrics: { 
        timestamp: Date.now(), 
        classicalMs: 15 + Math.random() * 5, 
        quantumMs: 45 + Math.random() * 10, 
        delta: 30 
      } 
    };
  }
}

// --- TYPES ---

type View = 'dashboard' | 'audit' | 'analytics' | 'settings' | 'help' | 'profile';

interface Notification {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  message: string;
  type: 'info' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'success';
  read: boolean;
  timestamp: number;
}

interface AppSettings {
  // Kernel
  latencyJitter: number;
  strictMode: boolean;
  // Security
  sessionTimeout: number;
  ipWhitelist: string;
  require2FA: boolean;
  // Notifications
  emailAlerts: boolean;
  slackWebhook: string;
  alertSeverity: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
  // Keys
  rotationInterval: number; // hours
}

// --- COMPONENTS ---

const Badge = ({ children, color }: { children: React.ReactNode, color: string }) => {
  const map: any = {
    emerald: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
    indigo: 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border-indigo-200',
    amber: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
    rose: 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border-rose-200',
    gray: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-200',
  };
  return <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold border ${map[color] || map.gray}`}>{children}</span>;
};

// Card Component with Custom Padding & Class Support
const Card = ({ title, icon: Icon, children, actions, padding = "p-6", className = "" }: any) => (
  <div className={`bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden h-full flex flex-col ${className}`}>
    <div className="px-5 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/30">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        {Icon && <Icon className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-500" />}
        <h3 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wide">{title}</h3>
      </div>
      {actions && <div className="flex gap-2">{actions}</div>}
    </div>
    <div className={`${padding} flex-1`}>{children}</div>
  </div>
);

// --- MAIN APPLICATION ---

export default function FusionVault() {
  const [currentView, setCurrentView] = useState<View>('dashboard');
  const [engine, setEngine] = useState<FusionEngine | null>(null);
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([
    { id: '1', title: 'System Update', message: 'Fusion Engine patched to v3.1.0', type: 'info', read: false, timestamp: Date.now() - 3600000 },
    { id: '2', title: 'High Latency', message: 'Quantum node response time > 100ms', type: 'warning', read: true, timestamp: Date.now() - 86400000 },
  ]);
  const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false);
  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<AppSettings>({
    latencyJitter: 50, strictMode: true, sessionTimeout: 30, 
    ipWhitelist: '10.0.0.*', require2FA: true, emailAlerts: true, 
    slackWebhook: '', alertSeverity: 'medium', rotationInterval: 24
  });
  
  // Initialize Engine
  useEffect(() => {
    const init = async () => {
      const eng = new FusionEngine();
      await eng.initialize();
      setEngine(eng);
    };
    init();
  }, []);

  const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length;

  // --- SUB-VIEWS ---

  const DashboardView = () => {
    const [status, setStatus] = useState<'idle'|'processing'|'success'>('idle');
    
    const runEncrypt = async () => {
      setStatus('processing');
      if (engine) {
        // Detailed log generation for the new Grid View
        const newLogs = [
          { id: crypto.randomUUID(), type: 'INIT', msg: 'Handshake initiated', ts: Date.now(), process: 'KRNL-01', latency: '0.2ms' },
          { id: crypto.randomUUID(), type: 'KGEN', msg: 'Generating P-256/Kyber Keypairs', ts: Date.now() + 10, process: 'CRYPTO-04', latency: '12ms' },
          { id: crypto.randomUUID(), type: 'ENC', msg: 'Fusion Encapsulation Complete', ts: Date.now() + 450, process: 'HYBRID-ENG', latency: '438ms' },
        ];
        
        await engine.encapsulate(engine.getPublicKeys(), settings);
        setLogs(prev => [...newLogs, ...prev]);
        setStatus('success');
        setTimeout(() => setStatus('idle'), 2000);
      }
    };

    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-in fade-in h-full">
        {/* TOP ROW: Secure Ops + Status */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
            <Card title="Secure Operations" icon={Lock} actions={<Badge color="emerald">READY</Badge>} padding="p-4">
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div>
                  <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 block">Input Payload</label>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <input 
                      type="text" 
                      className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded py-2 pl-9 pr-4 text-xs text-gray-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 outline-none font-mono" 
                      defaultValue="Confidential Data Payload..." 
                    />
                    <Database className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400 absolute left-3 top-2.5" />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  <div className="bg-blue-50/50 border border-blue-100 p-2.5 rounded group hover:border-blue-300 transition-colors cursor-default">
                    <div className="text-[10px] text-blue-600 font-semibold mb-0.5 flex items-center gap-1"><Cpu className="w-3 h-3"/> Classical Layer</div>
                    <div className="text-xs font-mono text-blue-800">NIST P-256 (ECC)</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-purple-50/50 border border-purple-100 p-2.5 rounded group hover:border-purple-300 transition-colors cursor-default">
                    <div className="text-[10px] text-purple-600 font-semibold mb-0.5 flex items-center gap-1"><Network className="w-3 h-3"/> Quantum Layer</div>
                    <div className="text-xs font-mono text-purple-800">MiniKyber-512 (Lattice)</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <button 
                  onClick={runEncrypt} 
                  disabled={status === 'processing'} 
                  className="w-full bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white py-2 rounded text-sm font-medium transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-sm active:scale-[0.99]"
                >
                  {status === 'processing' ? <RefreshCw className="w-3.5 h-3.5 animate-spin"/> : <Shield className="w-3.5 h-3.5"/>}
                  {status === 'processing' ? 'Encapsulating...' : status === 'success' ? 'Success' : 'Initiate Fusion'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </Card>
          </div>

          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
            <Card title="System Status" icon={Server} padding="p-4">
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center pb-2 border-b border-gray-50">
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium">Engine Core</span>
                  <Badge color="emerald">ONLINE</Badge>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center pb-2 border-b border-gray-50">
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium">Entropy Pool</span>
                  <Badge color="indigo">HIGH</Badge>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center pb-2 border-b border-gray-50">
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium">Last Rotation</span>
                  <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-600">2h 14m ago</span>
                </div>
                <div className="pt-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-gray-400 uppercase mb-1">
                    <span>Resource Usage</span>
                    <span>24%</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-1.5 mb-1">
                    <div className="bg-indigo-500 h-1.5 rounded-full" style={{width: '24%'}}></div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-mono mt-2">
                    <span>MEM: 142MB</span>
                    <span>LAT: 42ms</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </Card>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* BOTTOM ROW: EXPANDED Live Activity Feed */}
        <div className="flex-1 min-h-[300px]">
          <Card title="Live Activity Feed" icon={Activity} padding="p-0" className="h-full">
            <div className="bg-gray-50/50 border-b border-gray-100 px-4 py-2 grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
              <div className="col-span-2">Timestamp</div>
              <div className="col-span-2">Process ID</div>
              <div className="col-span-1">Type</div>
              <div className="col-span-5">Message Detail</div>
              <div className="col-span-2 text-right">Latency</div>
            </div>
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50 overflow-y-auto max-h-[350px]">
              {logs.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 text-gray-300">
                  <Activity className="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-20" />
                  <p className="text-xs">No active telemetry captured.</p>
                  <p className="text-[10px] mt-1">Initiate Fusion to begin logging.</p>
                </div>
              ) : logs.map(l => (
                <div key={l.id} className="px-4 py-2.5 grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 text-xs hover:bg-indigo-50/30 transition-colors group cursor-default">
                  <div className="col-span-2 font-mono text-gray-500 group-hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors">
                    {new Date(l.ts).toISOString().split('T')[1].replace('Z','')}
                  </div>
                  <div className="col-span-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <GitCommit className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-300 group-hover:text-indigo-400" />
                    <span className="font-mono text-gray-600">{l.process || 'SYS-01'}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="col-span-1">
                    <span className={`inline-flex px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[9px] font-bold border ${
                      l.type === 'ENC' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' :
                      l.type === 'KGEN' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100' :
                      'bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 border-gray-100'
                    }`}>
                      {l.type || 'INFO'}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="col-span-5 text-gray-700 font-medium truncate">
                    {l.msg}
                  </div>
                  <div className="col-span-2 text-right font-mono text-gray-400 group-hover:text-gray-600">
                    {l.latency || '<1ms'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const SettingsView = () => {
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('general');
    
    const Toggle = ({ label, checked, onChange }: any) => (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-4 border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">{label}</span>
        <button onClick={() => onChange(!checked)} className={`w-11 h-6 flex items-center rounded-full transition-colors ${checked ? 'bg-indigo-600' : 'bg-gray-200'}`}>
          <div className={`w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full shadow transform transition-transform ${checked ? 'translate-x-6' : 'translate-x-1'}`} />
        </button>
      </div>
    );

    const Input = ({ label, value, onChange, type="text" }: any) => (
      <div className="py-4 border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">{label}</label>
        <input type={type} value={value} onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 focus:border-indigo-500 outline-none" />
      </div>
    );

    return (
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-2">
        <div className="lg:col-span-1">
          <nav className="space-y-1">
            {['General', 'Security', 'Notifications', 'Keys'].map((tab) => (
              <button
                key={tab}
                onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.toLowerCase())}
                className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors ${
                  activeTab === tab.toLowerCase() 
                    ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700' 
                    : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                }`}
              >
                {tab} <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${activeTab === tab.toLowerCase() ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`} />
              </button>
            ))}
          </nav>
        </div>
        
        <div className="lg:col-span-3">
          <Card title={`${activeTab.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + activeTab.slice(1)} Settings`} icon={Sliders}>
            {activeTab === 'general' && (
              <div>
                <Toggle label="Strict Mode (Guard)" checked={settings.strictMode} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, strictMode: v})} />
                <Input label="Simulated Network Jitter (ms)" type="number" value={settings.latencyJitter} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, latencyJitter: parseInt(v)})} />
                <Toggle label="Developer Mode" checked={false} onChange={() => {}} />
              </div>
            )}
            {activeTab === 'security' && (
              <div>
                <Toggle label="Enforce 2FA for Admin Actions" checked={settings.require2FA} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, require2FA: v})} />
                <Input label="Session Timeout (minutes)" type="number" value={settings.sessionTimeout} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, sessionTimeout: parseInt(v)})} />
                <Input label="IP Whitelist (CIDR)" value={settings.ipWhitelist} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, ipWhitelist: v})} />
              </div>
            )}
            {activeTab === 'notifications' && (
              <div>
                <Toggle label="Email Alerts" checked={settings.emailAlerts} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, emailAlerts: v})} />
                <Input label="Slack Webhook URL" value={settings.slackWebhook} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, slackWebhook: v})} />
                <div className="py-4">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Minimum Alert Severity</label>
                  <select 
                    value={settings.alertSeverity} 
                    onChange={e => setSettings({...settings, alertSeverity: e.target.value as any})}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm"
                  >
                    <option value="low">Low (Log everything)</option>
                    <option value="medium">Medium (Warnings & Errors)</option>
                    <option value="high">High (Critical Errors Only)</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            {activeTab === 'keys' && (
              <div>
                <Input label="Auto-Rotation Interval (hours)" type="number" value={settings.rotationInterval} onChange={(v:any) => setSettings({...settings, rotationInterval: parseInt(v)})} />
                <div className="mt-6 p-4 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-100 rounded-lg">
                  <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-amber-800 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4"/> Emergency Key Revocation
                  </h4>
                  <p className="text-xs text-amber-700 mt-1 mb-3">This will invalidate all active sessions immediately.</p>
                  <button className="text-xs bg-white border border-amber-200 text-amber-700 px-3 py-1.5 rounded shadow-sm hover:bg-amber-50">Revoke All Keys</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </Card>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const AnalyticsView = () => {
    // Simple SVG Line Chart generator
    const generateLinePath = (points: number[], width: number, height: number) => {
      const max = Math.max(...points, 100);
      const stepX = width / (points.length - 1);
      return points.map((val, i) => 
        `${i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L'} ${i * stepX} ${height - (val / max) * height}`
      ).join(' ');
    };

    const data = [45, 52, 49, 62, 58, 65, 70, 68, 74, 80]; // Mock trend data

    return (
      <div className="space-y-6 animate-in fade-in">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <Card title="Total Operations" icon={Database}>
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">14,205</div>
            <div className="text-xs text-emerald-600 mt-1 flex items-center gap-1"><History className="w-3 h-3 rotate-[-45deg]"/> +12% this week</div>
          </Card>
          <Card title="Avg Latency (Fusion)" icon={Activity}>
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">42ms</div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">±5ms deviation</div>
          </Card>
          <Card title="Security Incidents" icon={ShieldAlert}>
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">0</div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Last 30 days</div>
          </Card>
        </div>

        <Card title="Throughput Trend (Ops/min)" icon={BarChart3}>
          <div className="h-64 w-full relative pt-4">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 800 200" className="w-full h-full overflow-visible">
              {/* Grid lines */}
              <line x1="0" y1="200" x2="800" y2="200" stroke="#e5e7eb" strokeWidth="1" />
              <line x1="0" y1="100" x2="800" y2="100" stroke="#e5e7eb" strokeWidth="1" strokeDasharray="4 4" />
              <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="800" y2="0" stroke="#e5e7eb" strokeWidth="1" strokeDasharray="4 4" />
              
              {/* Line */}
              <path 
                d={generateLinePath(data, 800, 200)} 
                fill="none" 
                stroke="#4f46e5" 
                strokeWidth="3" 
                strokeLinecap="round" 
                strokeLinejoin="round" 
              />
              
              {/* Area under curve */}
              <path 
                d={`${generateLinePath(data, 800, 200)} L 800 200 L 0 200 Z`} 
                fill="url(#gradient)" 
                opacity="0.1" 
              />
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="gradient" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#4f46e5" />
                  <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#4f46e5" stopOpacity="0" />
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
            </svg>
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const HelpView = () => (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 animate-in fade-in">
      <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6">
        <Card title="Frequently Asked Questions" icon={HelpCircle}>
          <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
            {[
              { q: "How do I rotate keys?", a: "Go to Settings > Keys and set the rotation interval, or manually trigger a rotation." },
              { q: "What is the 'Quantum Delta'?", a: "It represents the additional latency introduced by the Post-Quantum Lattice math compared to standard ECC." },
              { q: "Is strict mode required?", a: "Yes, for FIPS compliance, strict mode must be enabled to prevent downgrade attacks." }
            ].map((faq, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="py-4">
                <h4 className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 mb-1">{faq.q}</h4>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{faq.a}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
        <Card title="Documentation" icon={FileText}>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {['API Reference', 'Security Whitepaper', 'Integration Guide', 'Compliance Report'].map(doc => (
              <button key={doc} className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 border border-gray-100 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-sm text-indigo-600 font-medium">
                <FileText className="w-4 h-4" /> {doc}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
      <div className="space-y-6">
        <div className="bg-indigo-600 rounded-xl p-6 text-white shadow-md">
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-2">Need priority support?</h3>
          <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-4">Enterprise customers get 24/7 dedicated engineering support.</p>
          <button className="w-full bg-white text-indigo-600 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-50">Contact Engineering</button>
        </div>
        <Card title="System Health" icon={Activity}>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-emerald-600"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4"/> API Gateway Operational</div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-emerald-600"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4"/> HSM Cluster Online</div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-emerald-600"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4"/> Fusion Engine Stable</div>
          </div>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const ProfileView = () => (
    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto animate-in fade-in">
      <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
        <div className="h-32 bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-purple-600"></div>
        <div className="px-8 pb-8">
          <div className="relative flex justify-between items-end -mt-12 mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-end gap-4">
              <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-white rounded-full p-1 shadow-lg">
                <div className="w-full h-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">
                  <User className="w-12 h-12" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="mb-1">
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Admin User</h2>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                  <Mail className="w-3 h-3" /> sec-ops@fusion.local
                  <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                  <Shield className="w-3 h-3" /> Root Administrator
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button className="bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium shadow-sm hover:bg-gray-50">Edit Profile</button>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-wider">Session Info</h3>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Current Session IP</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-mono text-gray-900">192.168.1.42</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Last Login</span>
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-900">Today, 09:41 AM</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">2FA Status</span>
                <Badge color="emerald">ENABLED</Badge>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-wider">Access Rights</h3>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {['Key Management', 'Audit Logs', 'System Config', 'User Admin', 'Billing'].map(perm => (
                  <span key={perm} className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 text-xs rounded border border-gray-200">{perm}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  // --- TOP LEVEL LAYOUT ---

  const NotificationCenter = () => {
    if (!showNotifications) return null;
    return (
      <div className="absolute top-16 right-8 w-80 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-xl z-50 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2 overflow-hidden">
        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50 flex justify-between items-center">
          <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Notifications</h4>
          <button onClick={() => setNotifications(n => n.map(i => ({...i, read:true})))} className="text-xs text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800">Mark all read</button>
        </div>
        <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
          {notifications.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="p-8 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm">No notifications</div>
          ) : (
            notifications.map(n => (
              <div key={n.id} className={`p-4 border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${!n.read ? 'bg-indigo-50/30' : ''}`}>
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <div className={`mt-1 w-2 h-2 rounded-full shrink-0 ${n.type === 'info' ? 'bg-blue-500' : 'bg-amber-500'}`} />
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{n.title}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">{n.message}</div>
                    <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-2">{new Date(n.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const NavItem = ({ id, icon: Icon, label }: any) => (
    <button onClick={() => setCurrentView(id)} className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 border-l-2 ${currentView === id ? 'bg-white border-indigo-500 text-indigo-700 shadow-sm' : 'border-transparent text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100'}`}>
      <Icon className={`w-4 h-4 ${currentView === id ? 'text-indigo-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
      {label}
    </button>
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 text-gray-900 font-sans flex selection:bg-indigo-100 selection:text-indigo-900">
      {/* SIDEBAR */}
      <aside className="w-64 bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex-col hidden md:flex sticky top-0 h-screen z-30">
        <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-2 rounded-lg border border-indigo-100"><Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" /></div>
          <div><h1 className="font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">FUSION</h1><p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-mono tracking-widest uppercase">Vault v4.0</p></div>
        </div>
        <nav className="flex-1 py-6 space-y-1">
          <NavItem id="dashboard" icon={LayoutDashboard} label="Console" />
          <NavItem id="audit" icon={FileText} label="Audit Trail" />
          <NavItem id="analytics" icon={BarChart3} label="Analytics" />
          <div className="pt-6 pb-2 px-6 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">System</div>
          <NavItem id="settings" icon={Settings} label="Configuration" />
          <NavItem id="help" icon={HelpCircle} label="Help & Support" />
        </nav>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-100">
          <button onClick={() => setCurrentView('profile')} className="w-full bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-3 flex items-center gap-3 border border-gray-200 hover:border-indigo-200 transition-colors">
            <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center border border-gray-200 shadow-sm"><User className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" /></div>
            <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden text-left"><div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 truncate">Admin User</div><div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 truncate">sec-ops@fusion.local</div></div>
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* MAIN */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 bg-gray-50/50">
        <header className="h-16 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-20 px-8 flex items-center justify-between shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
            <span className="hover:text-gray-900 font-medium">Fusion</span>
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900 capitalize">{currentView}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-full shadow-sm">
              <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${engine ? 'bg-emerald-500' : 'bg-amber-500'}`} />
              <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600">{engine ? 'SYSTEM ONLINE' : 'INITIALIZING'}</span>
            </div>
            <div className="relative">
              <button onClick={() => setShowNotifications(!showNotifications)} className="relative text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors p-1">
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
                {unreadCount > 0 && <span className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 bg-rose-500 rounded-full border-2 border-white"></span>}
              </button>
              <NotificationCenter />
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>

        <div className="p-8 flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
          {currentView === 'dashboard' && <DashboardView />}
          {currentView === 'audit' && (
            <Card title="Audit Trail" icon={FileText} actions={<button onClick={() => setLogs([])} className="text-xs text-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-50 px-3 py-1 border border-rose-200 rounded">Clear</button>}>
              <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
                {logs.length === 0 ? <p className="text-center text-gray-400 py-8">No records</p> : logs.map(l => (
                  <div key={l.id} className="py-3 flex justify-between text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 px-2 rounded">
                    <span className="text-gray-700">{l.msg}</span>
                    <span className="text-gray-400 font-mono text-xs">{new Date(l.ts).toISOString()}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </Card>
          )}
          {currentView === 'analytics' && <AnalyticsView />}
          {currentView === 'settings' && <SettingsView />}
          {currentView === 'help' && <HelpView />}
          {currentView === 'profile' && <ProfileView />}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}
